title: John Cygan
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|John}}
{{Person
|image=[[File:JohnCygan.jpg]]
|name=John Cygan
|birth=[[1950s|1954]]<ref name="Hollywood Reporter">{{WebCite|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/john-cygan-dead-commish-actor-was-63-1003999|text=John Cygan, Actor on 'The Commish,' Dies at 63|author=Mike Barnes|date=2017-05-15|work=[[Wikipedia:The Hollywood Reporter|The Hollywood Reporter]]|archivedate=20191104115639}}</ref>
|death=[[May 13]], [[2017]]<ref name="Hollywood Reporter" />
|listedpronouns=<!--Only include pronouns if they have been explicitly specified by the individual to which this article pertains.-->
|nationality=[[Wikipedia:Americans|American]]<ref name="Hollywood Reporter" />

|website=

'''John Cygan''' ([[1950s|1954]] – [[May 13]], [[2017]])<ref name="Hollywood Reporter" /> was an [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] [[Wikipedia:Actor|actor]], [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who had done the voice of [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] in ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'', ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' as well as [[Rand Talor]] in that game.<ref name="Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref> Cygan had also provided the voice of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in the [[Dark Empire (audio)|''Dark Empire'']], [[Dark Empire II (audio)|''Dark Empire II'']] and [[Empire's End (audio)|''Empire's End'']] audio dramatizations;<ref name="Dark Empire">[[Dark Empire (audio)|''Dark Empire '' audio drama]]</ref> [[Canderous Ordo|Canderous Ordo/Mandalore the Preserver]] in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''; and [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] in the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith|''Dark Lords of the Sith'']] audio dramatization.<ref name="Dark Lords of the Sith">[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]</ref> Outside of ''Star Wars'' projects, Cygan was also well known for providing the voice of [[W:c:metalgear:Solidus Snake|Solidus Snake]] in [[W:c:metalgear:Hideo Kojima|Hideo Kojima's]] ''[[W:c:metalgear:Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty|Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty]]''.<ref name="Hollywood Reporter" />
